events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Seventy-nine years young for the man behind some of rock's most iconic riffs. What's your favourite Brian May solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' iconic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years of rock and roll royalty! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched in the US on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV's Big Bang
angles.copy: Forty-five years since MTV changed music forever! Remember seeing 'Video Killed The Radio Star' for the very first time? Or just hearing about it?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, launching them into global stardom.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and Britpop was never the same. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music. The spirit of Woodstock still lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: The world remembers 'The King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur being shot
events.blurb: On September 7, 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in a drive-by shooting in Las Vegas, tragically passing away six days later.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Thirty years since the tragic shooting of Tupac Shakur. His impact on music and culture remains undeniable.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: The world remembers guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who tragically passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, who left us too soon on this day in 1970. His music still sounds as revolutionary as ever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since the Fab Four gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history, isn't it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking hard, still sounding amazing. What's your favourite Pretenders tune?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The iconic voice of Oasis and a successful solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing that undeniable swagger to the stage. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: A Message of Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its powerful message of peace and unity.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple famously unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket' and revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the iPod changed how we listen to music forever. Remember getting your first one?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite 007 and what's the best Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles legend John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the enduring legacy of John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-seven years young for the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', in the UK on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: The White Album Legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles delivered the sprawling masterpiece that is 'The White Album'. A truly diverse collection of tracks.
